rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by fixing unresolved references or removing invalid clauses, not by adding unrelated architecture
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Align helper declaration types with the expression types in guarantees
Remove guarantees with type <error> or invalid expressions
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics without changing unrelated architecture
Use only visible identifiers in contracts
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Remove invalid guarantees instead of adding architecture
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE scalar types are int, real, and bool
Integer literals and arithmetic are int
Real literals and arithmetic are real
anti_patterns: Do not add architecture to repair validator diagnostics
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
